title: Italian Delight Remade
description: 1.20.1 Port of Italian's Delight, a Farmer's Delight addon that adds various foods from Italian culture.
body:
# Overview: Italian's Delight adds a plethora of food from Italian culture, such as various pastas, wines, and pizza. This is a 1.20.1 remake of the original mod, which was abandoned by the developer. It is developed on MCreator like the original mod was. I created a curseforge page for contact in the comments. Alternatively, there are 2 Discord servers you can join:
1- [Old Discord server](https://discord.gg/76Z9HxepZx)
Original Italian Delight's server with the old original developer that ~~ghosted~~ dropped the project, it was where a few unhappy players started the idea of a remake, but warning: it is a bit of a cursed mess in there with loose moderation.
2- [Minty's Discord server](https://discord.gg/gsDj2MCMju)
The current developer's new server for future mods and similar, it's still very empty/inactive. # Dependencies: - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [Brewin' n Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) # Differences from original: - Better cross-mod recipe compatibility. - Some of newer foods are obtainable now. - Provisory recipes to compensate for lack of worldgen. JEI or similar is recommended. - Some missing features still being added. # Frequently Asked Questions: **Q: Will you update for x version?**
A: Only 1.20.1 will be supported for now. Chances of 1.21.1. **Q: Why is this and that missing?**
A: This is a remake of the mod from scratch and still missing things, it's only being released early so people can enjoy features already available. **Q: When will the remake be complete?**
A: No idea. This is mostly a hobby. Tortoise approach, step by step we'll get there eventually. **Q: Will there be NEW food?**
A: There are plans but probably as a separate mod like how it was done with My Nether's Delight. **Q: But isn't this food new?**
A: Things like Herb Leaves and Ciambellone were already in the original mod they just weren't available to players yet.
